title: carlina barnebiana
intro: Carlina barnebiana, also known as the Carline thistle, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating, due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Carlina barnebiana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or capsules, and is traditionally used to support digestive health and relieve menstrual cramps.
